pinned.msg: If you would scrutinise my post word by word, you should be able to observe at no point I am promoting/indulging in a dichotomous thinking, and I never want to sympathise with the CCP (although I did point out its "viciousness" pales in its affectiveness when I realise the US also committed numerous hegemonic acts). The whole post is only meant to articulate my confusion as to finding the truth in conflicting narratives (which often are accompanied by ostensibly sound evidence), and that without real power and knowledge one seems to be reduced to automaton fed with propaganda. It's never meant to say the US is bad and therefore the CCP is a lesser evil and should be embraced, OK?
